description:
Maker 3D CAD — the middle ground between Tinkercad and FreeCAD.

Materializr is open-source 3D CAD for makers — the middle ground between
dead-simple tools like Tinkercad and full professional suites like FreeCAD.
Sketch on a plane, pull it into a solid (extrude, revolve, loft, sweep),
fillet and chamfer, run booleans, cut threads, and edit any step of the
history later. Sketches export to SVG at 1:1 mm for laser cutters and 2.5D
CNC; it imports STEP and IGES and exports STEP, STL, IGES, glTF and SVG. Real
B-rep solids on the OpenCASCADE kernel.
Materializr 1.4.1 — a polish release: the touch-layout features that didn't quite make 1.4.0, plus a batch of fixes.
im-touch layout catches up
The im-touch (tablet) Items panel now does what Classic and Modern already could:
- Press-and-hold any row for a context menu — rename, delete, and (for bodies) move to a folder.
- Folders. Group bodies with a visible + Folder button on the Bodies header; tap a folder to collapse it, and its eye hides the whole group at once. Folders are shared with the other layouts and saved with the project.
- Colour swatches on body and folder rows — tap for a hue-wheel picker; a folder's colour cascades to its member bodies.
- The redundant project-name row was dropped to reclaim vertical space (it already shows in the top-left chip).
Tidier tool rails
- Split X/Y/Z fold into a single Split flyout, and Linear/Circular into a Pattern flyout — in both the Modern and im-touch rails.
- Modern's draw-origin sub-toggle (Corner/Center) is now a full-width highlighted bar so it reads as part of its tool.
Touch text entry
- Numeric fields now raise the device's native keyboard on focus; the now-redundant on-screen-keyboard toggle was removed from the Modern and Classic top bars.
- Sketch dimension entry on touch got friendlier: a viewport-right field, two-field rectangle (W×H) entry, and line aim/type — and the mid-draw dimension field and confirm bubble sit off to the side so they never cover what you're drawing.
Fixes
- Edit Diameter on a curved face: the field no longer grows without bound or render differently from the rest — it's a stable, fixed-width input now (touch and desktop).
- Reload no longer raises a "frozen feature" warning for benign sketch-only steps.
- Startup dialogs now take turns, fixing an iPad second-launch lockup.
- Android quick-save writes the real document again (Save As keeps its own name).
- Sketch: a rim point can no longer dissolve a circle's loop; circle radius snaps to the grid; and far-off arc centres no longer blow out the camera framing.
Downloads
- Linux: Materializr-x86_64.AppImage / Materializr-aarch64.AppImage
- Windows: Materializr-Setup.exe (or the portable Materializr-windows-x64.zip)
- macOS (Apple Silicon): Materializr-1.4.1-arm64.dmg
- Android: dist-apk-arm64-v8a-1.4.1.apk / dist-apk-x86_64-1.4.1.apk — also on Google Play and F-Droid
- Windows via winget: winget install Materializr.Materializr
